sentences.arabic: زُرْتُ سُوقًا لَيْلِيًّا مَشْهُورًا فِي الْمَدِينَةِ بَعْدَ الْعَشَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Posjetio sam poznatu noćnu pijacu u gradu nakon večere.
sentences.translationEn: I visited a famous night market in the city after dinner.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ السُّوقُ مُضَاءً بِالأَضْوَاءِ الزَّاهِيَةِ وَالصَّاخِبِ بِالنَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Pijaca je bila osvijetljena živim svjetlima i bučna od naroda.
sentences.translationEn: The market was lit with bright lights and noisy with people.

sentences.arabic: رَأَيْتُ أَكَلَاتٍ وَمَلَابِسَ وَأَشْيَاءَ يَدَوِيَّةَ الصُّنْعِ.
sentences.translation: Vidio sam hranu, odjeću i ručno rađene predmete.
sentences.translationEn: I saw food, clothing, and handmade items.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ قُمْصَانَ وَعَطُورًا وَبَعْضَ الْحُلِّيِّ الصَّغِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam majice, parfeme i malo nakita.
sentences.translationEn: I bought T-shirts, perfumes, and some small jewellery.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ السُّوقُ اللَّيْلِيُّ تَجْرِبَةً مُثِيرَةً وَلَا تُنْسَى.
sentences.translation: Noćna pijaca bila je uzbudljivo i nezaboravno iskustvo.
sentences.translationEn: The night market was an exciting and unforgettable experience.
